issues.info: Message me on Discord @professordragon, or sumbit an issue on GitHub.

bpm.name: BPM
bpm.description: Enter the song BPM to make gameplay sync. Ignored when Constant CPS is enabled.

constant-cps.name: Constant CPS
constant-cps.description: Use a fixed clicks-per-second rate instead of BPM. When enabled, BPM is ignored.

cps.name: CPS
cps.description: The exact clicks per second to use when Constant CPS is enabled.

use-player-clicks.name: Use player clicks
use-player-clicks.description: If enabled, the gameplay will form around your clicks. If not, clicks will be inserted at random.

fast-click-fix.name: Fast click fix
fast-click-fix.description: Fixes a bug where clicking too fast prevents objects from generating in spider and other non-flying gamemodes. Uses the trail queue to detect clicks that were consumed before the next update frame.

blocks-enabled.name: Blocks
blocks-enabled.description: When disabled, block-type objects (landing platforms and ground blocks) will not be placed during generation. Only orbs, pads, rings, and portals will spawn.

spawn-chance.name: Spawn chance
spawn-chance.description: The probability (0–100%) that an object actually spawns at each placement opportunity. 100% means objects always spawn; lower values produce sparser layouts.

spike-margin.name: Spike margin
spike-margin.description: Controls how close the spikes are to the player. Lower values make the gameplay less forgiving.

experimental-gameplay.name: Experimental gameplay
experimental-gameplay.description: Adds experimental gameplay elements such as late ring timings, jump pads while flying, and green gravity portals.

debug-trail.name: Debug trail
debug-trail.description: Leaves an object trail behind the player while generating. An X indicates the jump button is pressed.
